notes.basis_story: Chainlink settled products lean on spot/perp basis, basis change, and return/vol context rather than raw orderbook pressure.
notes.selection_metric: Best calibrated fair-probability estimate on actual historical trade timestamps.
notes.starter_logic: Production final: calibrated Chainlink fair-mid model everywhere, conservative shrink/caps by product, and one explicit delayed basis overlay for BTC 30s.
notes.production_rationale: Flat by default, but apply a delayed Binance-spot basis-delta overlay. If 30s gap change vs spot exceeds 2bp, skew lightly; if it exceeds 3bp, skew moderately. Entry is assumed at t+1s.
